entries.name: Coriolis auto-spawn
evidence: Shipped DefaultGame.ini contains the key.
Repo UserGame.ini overrides the key.
SERVER_RUNTIME_SURFACES.md maps it to Sandstorm/Coriolis behavior.
entries.validationProcedure: Set true/false in a lab config, restart the affected map, then compare Coriolis warning/spawn logs and client warnings.
entries.rollbackProcedure: Restore backed-up UserGame.ini and restart affected maps.

entries.name: Coriolis triggers Shifting Sands
evidence: Shipped DefaultGame.ini contains the key.
SERVER_CONFIG_KEY_INDEX.md lists it under SandStormConfig.
No per-partition variant has been found.
entries.validationProcedure: In a lab DD cycle, set true, trigger or wait for Coriolis, then compare shiftingsands_data/world reset seed rows before and after.
entries.rollbackProcedure: Set false, restore config backup, and restart affected maps.

entries.name: Deep Desert Shifting Sands feature
evidence: Shipped DefaultGame.ini contains DeepDesert m_ShiftingSands=True.
The repo can override the full MapFeatures m_Maps value.
No dimension-specific MapFeatures key has been found.
entries.validationProcedure: Restart a lab Deep Desert with m_ShiftingSands=False, then check client map state, world reset seed rows, and shiftingsands_data over a cycle.
entries.rollbackProcedure: Restore shipped DeepDesert m_ShiftingSands=True entry and restart affected maps.

entries.name: Deep Desert spice field caps
evidence: Shipped config contains per-map spice field caps.
Live DB materializes values in dune.spicefield_types.
DEEP_DESERT_EVENT_KNOBS.md documents before/after queries.
entries.validationProcedure: Change Medium/Large caps, restart DD, then query spicefield_types, spicefield_server_availability, and resourcefield_state.
entries.rollbackProcedure: Restore backed-up UserGame.ini and restart Deep Desert.

entries.name: Coriolis seed DB functions
evidence: Non-destructive DB surface dump captured the functions in captures/research/20260522T161723Z/db-surface.json.
Function names distinguish farm, map, and partition seed scopes.
entries.validationProcedure: On a disposable lab stack, snapshot debug_get_coriolis_seeds(), set one partition seed, restart only that lab DD if needed, then compare seed and map behavior.
entries.rollbackProcedure: Restore the lab database snapshot or call the matching cleanup function only in a disposable lab.

entries.name: Static Shifting Sands DB functions
evidence: Non-destructive DB surface dump captured the functions in captures/research/20260522T161723Z/db-surface.json.
The function names imply persisted static Shifting Sands records.
entries.validationProcedure: Use retrieve_all_static_shifting_sand() before and after a lab Coriolis/Shifting Sands event, then compare counts and payloads.
entries.rollbackProcedure: Restore the lab database snapshot. Do not run delete_all_static_shifting_sand() on production without a tested restore path.

entries.name: Spice field dimension state
evidence: Non-destructive DB surface dump captured map_name and dimension_index parameters.
The parameters match the intended two-Deep-Desert test shape.
entries.validationProcedure: Run two lab Deep Desert dimensions and compare spicefield_types/resourcefield_state grouped by map and dimension_index.
entries.rollbackProcedure: Restore the lab database snapshot or restart the lab map services after returning config to baseline.

entries.name: Native Coriolis command strings
evidence: Focused binary string extraction captured the commands in captures/research/20260522T161723Z/binary-strings.focus.txt.
entries.validationProcedure: Only probe print commands in a disposable lab after the native GM/RMQ command envelope is proven.
entries.rollbackProcedure: Do not invoke restart, wipe, or map reset commands outside a disposable lab.

entries.name: Offline player partition move
evidence: Function exists in the live schema.
Admin panel dry-run and gated execution path are implemented.
docs/soft-disconnect-teleport.md documents the workflow.
entries.validationProcedure: Use dry-run on an offline disposable player, execute with confirmation, then verify pawn partition/map/dimension and relog behavior.
entries.rollbackProcedure: Move the player back to the prior partition/location recorded in the audit result.

entries.name: Native GM command payload
evidence: Binary strings expose command subsystem and allowed commands.
RabbitMQ delivery to candidate queues has been proven.
The final accepted payload contract is still unverified.
entries.validationProcedure: Publish PrintPos with a unique correlation id through a lab broker route, capture RMQ delivery, replies, and server logs for a command execution line.
entries.rollbackProcedure: No persistent rollback for safe probes; keep mutation commands gated until PrintPos is proven.
